exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Bench Press
exercises.notes: Up from 20kg — 2 working sets of 12 at RPE 8. Use normal grip: the narrow grip you tried last time hit shoulders, not pecs.

exercises.name: Box Squat
exercises.notes: Up 2.5kg from 50 — 3x10 at RPE 7. Keep limited depth, control the box touch (right knee).

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.notes: Hold — 3x12 at RPE 9 last time. Get all sets at RPE<=8 before adding.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Hold — 12/10/10 at RPE 9. Stay at 10kg, aim 3x10 clean before adding (right knee).

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Up 5kg from 40 — 3x12 at RPE 6 (lots in the tank). Drop to 42.5 if the stack allows and 45 feels >RPE 8.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Hold — last set dropped to 9 at RPE 10. Get 4x10 clean before adding. Permanent last exercise.
